title: Rich Jamaican Carnaroli Rice Pilaf
description: A resinous and fluffy Jamaican dish featuring Carnaroli rice, perfect for a brunch mood, this halal-friendly recipe is a delicious twist on traditional pilaf.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped scotch bonnet pepper and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Stir in the curry powder and thyme, cooking for 1 minute.
Add the rinsed Carnaroli rice, stirring to coat the rice with the spice mixture.
Add the chicken broth and salt, bringing the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes, or until the liquid is absorbed and the rice is tender.
Fluff the rice with a fork and serve hot.
